description_long: This is a hardcover book with a dust jacket featuring a visually striking front cover. The front displays a stylized illustration of a golden, robed figure in profile against a purple and white background, giving it a surreal and artistic appearance. The back cover is mostly black with a high-contrast monochrome photograph of a man with glasses, partially in shadow. The spine is cream-colored with vertically oriented text and subtle wear marks, matching the front cover's color palette. The book's pages are visible from the top and bottom, showing a standard thickness for a novel or story collection. The overall condition suggests it is a well-preserved, vintage edition.
description: A hardcover book with a dust jacket, featuring a stylized golden figure on a purple background and a monochrome photo on the back. The spine is cream with vertical text and the book appears well-kept.
description_view_0: The front cover shows a golden, robed figure in profile against a purple and white background, with large, prominent title text.
description_view_1: The top edge reveals the book's thickness and the cream-colored dust jacket wrapping around the hardcover.
description_view_2: The back cover features a high-contrast black and white photograph of a man, with some visible wear and scuff marks.
description_view_3: The spine is cream-colored with vertically oriented text and minor wear, showing the book's title and author.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover depicts a stylized, golden-robed human figure in profile, set against a dreamy, purple and white background. The art style is somewhat surreal and painterly, with soft gradients and a contemplative mood. The figure stands out prominently, lending the cover a sense of mystery and intrigue.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is cream-colored with vertically oriented text in a simple, sans-serif font. There are no decorative patterns, but some minor wear and discoloration are visible.
